site.title: ION Print & Promo | real estate signs
site.description: Professional real estate sign services for real estate agents and brokers across Simcoe County. We design, print, install, and remove durable coroplast signs backed by 20+ years of experience (formerly Cardinal Signs & Gibson Digital Print).

hero.title: Real Estate Signs
hero.imageAlt: Real estate signs on a lawn

centreText.title: Real Estate Signs, Done Right
centreText.description: Professional real estate sign printing and installation services for realtors and brokers across Barrie, Innisfil, Oro, Orillia, Midland and beyond.

features.title: Backed by experience.
features.description:
We have over 20 years of experience through our partnership with Cardinal Signs, formerly Gibson Digital Print.

From durable coroplast signs and sturdy wooden posts to custom sign toppers, installation and take-down, we help your listings get noticed where it matters.
features.imageAlt: Real estate coroplast lawn sign installation

features.title: More ways to market your listings.
features.description:
We also offer print and promotional services for realtors, including business cards, feature sheets, client gifts and more.

We are here to power up your real estate business.
features.imageAlt: Sign post installation in front yard

accordions.title: How fast can you turn around sign orders?
accordions.content: Most standard coroplast and aluminum signs are ready within 2–3 business days. Rush turnarounds are available — contact us to discuss your timeline.

accordions.title: How quickly can you install after printing?
accordions.content: We typically schedule installation within 1–2 business days of sign completion. We'll confirm a time that works with your listing schedule.

accordions.title: Do you handle sign removal after a sale?
accordions.content: Yes. Once your listing closes, just give us a call or send an email and we'll arrange prompt removal. We can also set up automatic removal scheduling if you prefer.

accordions.title: Can you set up a program for our whole brokerage?
accordions.content: Absolutely. We work with brokerages to create templated sign programs so every agent's materials are on-brand and easy to order. Reach out to discuss volume pricing and setup.

accordions.title: What rider panels do you offer?
accordions.content: We print standard riders (Sold, Open House, Price Reduced, For Lease, etc.) as well as fully custom riders with agent names, phone numbers, or brokerage branding.

cta.heading: Ready to put your listings in the spotlight? Contact our team today.
